name: Ofe Oha
intro: Dissolve the ground achi seeds in 6 tablespoons of cold water to form a paste, add to the pot and stir rapidly. Add the meat alternatives and season with salt to taste. Cook for 10 minutes on medium-high heat, stirring frequently until the soup starts to thicken slightly.

ingredients.item: ground achi seeds Salt to taste

method: Add the water, palm oil, cameroon pepper, vegetable stock cube and ogiri to a pot and bring to a boil.
Add the seaweed, oha leaves and uziza leaves, and cook for a further 10 minutes.
Serve with a swallow of your choice, such as eba, pounded yam or semovita.
